APPEARANCES:
Kim Reeder appearing as a representative for the San Francisco Housing Authority.

Defendant Zsa Zsa Randall is present.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. All parties and counsel are present and confer privately with the Judge Pro Tem. No settlement reached, trial date remains set.
